content:
MODULE: cosmos.health.dashboard.server
FILE: cosmos/health/dashboard/server.py (815 lines)
CATEGORY: health

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Health Dashboard Server

FastAPI server for health tracking dashboard with WebSocket support
for real-time metric streaming.

CLASSES:
- HealthWebSocketManager: Manages WebSocket connections for real-time health updates.
  Methods: async def connect(self, websocket: WebSocket)
  Methods: def disconnect(self, websocket: WebSocket)
  Methods: async def broadcast(self, message: dict)
  Methods: async def send_metric_update(self, reading: HealthMetricReading)
- DateRangeRequest(BaseModel)
- GoalCreateRequest(BaseModel)
- GoalUpdateRequest(BaseModel)
- MealLogRequest(BaseModel)
- FoodSearchRequest(BaseModel)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def startup()
- async def shutdown()
- async def dashboard_page(request: Request)
- async def nutrition_page(request: Request)
- async def documents_page(request: Request)
- async def insights_page(request: Request)
- async def get_health_summary(date_str: Optional[str]=None)
- async def get_metrics(metric_type: str, start_date: Optional[str]=None, end_date: Optional[str]=None)
- async def get_trends(days: int=7)
- async def get_alerts()
